status_legend.in_progress: 当前唯一正在推进的任务。
status_legend.blocked: 阻塞原因已记录，当前无法继续推进。
status_legend.passing: 要求的验证已经通过，并且证据已经记录。

features.title: 建立开源项目 harness 基线
features.user_visible_behavior: 新会话可以只阅读仓库文件，理解项目状态、工作规则、下一步任务和验证入口。
verification: 确认 feature_list.json 是有效 JSON。
确认 AGENTS.md、README.md、CONTRIBUTING.md 和 docs/harness/* 文件存在。
确认 progress.md 记录本次配置证据。
evidence: 2026-05-26: bash init.sh exited 0 and printed VoxType harness baseline OK, License: Apache-2.0, Product scaffold: not started.
2026-05-26: required harness files, LICENSE, .gitignore, .editorconfig, .gitattributes, docs/research/README.md, and openspec/README.md are present.
features.notes: Harness baseline is verified. Discovery and research are now complete; next highest-priority task is spec-001.

features.title: 整理原始需求并澄清产品边界
features.user_visible_behavior: 维护者可以看到 VoxType 的目标用户、核心场景、非目标、MVP 边界和待决问题。
verification: 明确列出已知事实、假设、风险和需要维护者确认的问题。
evidence: 2026-05-26: Read docs/plans/原始需求.md with UTF-8 output and extracted product intent, MVP behavior, non-goals, assumptions, risks, and maintainer decisions.
2026-05-26: Wrote TMP/research/requirements-brief.md as detailed intermediate notes.
2026-05-26: Wrote docs/research/requirements-brief.md as durable project research.
features.notes: Original draft remains input only. Apache-2.0 in repository files is the license fact source.

features.title: 调研语音输入法和本地转写开源项目
features.user_visible_behavior: 维护者可以比较相关开源项目的技术路线、许可证、活跃度、可借鉴点和风险。
verification: 使用 web search 和 GitHub API 搜索相关项目。
记录至少 8 个相关项目或库。
产出 docs/research/open-source-landscape.md，包含来源 URL、结论和不确定性。
evidence: 2026-05-26: Used Tavily and GitHub API search for local dictation, Windows hotkey, Whisper, and ASR projects.
2026-05-26: Deep-read local clones under TMP/research/repos/: Handy, openless, openwhispr, VoiceFlow, whisper-writer, tambourine-voice, and faster-whisper-dictation.
2026-05-26: Verified additional ecosystem references via GitHub metadata: whisper.cpp, sherpa-onnx, local-whisper, FluidAudio, and FluidVoice.
2026-05-26: Wrote TMP/research/repo-candidates.md and TMP/research/solution-analysis.md as intermediate research notes.
features.notes: Research covers more than 8 related projects/libraries. GPL/AGPL projects are concept-only references for this Apache-2.0 project.

features.title: 形成 VoxType MVP 技术方案
features.user_visible_behavior: 维护者可以在 2-3 个方案中选择 MVP 路线，并看到权衡、风险和验证策略。
verification: 使用 superpowers:brainstorming 产出设计。
在 openspec/changes/ 下记录 proposal.md 和 tasks.md。
features.notes: 必须在 discovery-001 和 research-001 之后。

features.title: 创建最小可运行项目骨架
features.user_visible_behavior: 贡献者可以按 README 的命令启动最小应用，并运行基础测试。
verification: 运行格式化、lint/typecheck 和测试基线。
更新 README 的真实启动与验证命令。
features.notes: 需要先确认技术栈。可能需要 npm/cargo 网络授权。
